stat_block.text: This oversized greataxe, infamous for the chilling laughter it emits whenever it takes a life, was crafted by the frost giant sorcerer Jorngarl from the *final blade* named Toothy Morris after it was stolen in an attack on a Gray Gardener convoy. It functions as a *+3 major striking* *vorpal* *greataxe* that retains the unique properties of a *final blade*, trapping the souls of any it slays and preventing them from being returned to life by any means short of divine intervention, even a *wish* ritual or similar magic.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Occult
traits.text:
This magic comes from the occult tradition, calling upon bizarre and ephemeral mysteries. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to occult magic.
